ValidationRule.description: All currently supported event types require a loan request.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( TEXT(EventType__c) = "STATUS_CHANGED", TEXT(EventType__c) = "HIGH_VALUE_STATUS_REVIEW", TEXT(EventType__c) = "APPROVAL_EMAIL_SENT", TEXT(EventType__c) = "INTEGRATION_RESULT" ), ISBLANK(LoanRequest__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: A loan request is required for this audit event type.
